name: rr-table-row
summary: A row inside rr-table; carries role=row, its zebra/hover/selected visuals are painted by the parent table's stylesheet.
rules: Never use hex values. Always use var(--color-*) semantic tokens
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
Drive selected from your selection model — it is the only state the row owns

keyboard: None of its own — interactive cell content keeps its native keyboard behavior
rules: role=row lives on the host so the flattened tree reads table → rowgroup → row → cell
selected reflects to aria-selected=true and clears when deselected
